g.text: Allowed claim: a model-conditional null ladder separates degree, edge-scale and strict embedded-geometry baselines.

text.style: font-size: 6.45px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #20242a

g.text: The full-city low-intensity layer tests coverage; the higher-intensity subset tests sensitivity.

text.style: font-size: 6.45px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #20242a

g.text: Forbidden overclaim: not a universal planar theorem, causal urban-design rule or high-intensity all-city planar null.

text.style: font-size: 5.8px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #687386

g.text: Evidence domains are separated: full-city low-intensity coverage is not a planar-percolation proof.
